seoTitle: Magpie vs Maiden Gully — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Magpie and Maiden Gully. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Magpie vs Maiden Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Magpie and Maiden Gully.
heading: Magpie vs Maiden Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Magpie, Victoria and Maiden Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maiden Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Magpie (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Magpie or Maiden Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Magpie has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Maiden Gully scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Magpie scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Maiden Gully scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Magpie or Maiden Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maiden Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
